description_long: This is a rectangular, brown glass bottle with a wide, flat base and straight, vertical sides that taper slightly toward the neck. The neck is topped with a round, light-colored stopper or cap, which appears to be made of a different material, possibly plastic or ceramic. The front face of the bottle features a cream-colored label with black text, indicating it is a bottle of cough syrup, and providing dosage instructions and branding details. The bottle has a glossy, reflective surface, suggesting it is made of glass. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage medicinal bottles, with a utilitarian yet classic appearance. There are no visible signs of damage or wear, and the bottle appears to be empty or its contents are not visible.
description: A brown, rectangular glass bottle with a light-colored stopper and a vintage-style cough syrup label on the front. The bottle has a glossy finish and a classic medicinal appearance.
description_view_0: The bottle is seen from the back, showing its brown, glossy surface and the light-colored stopper, with no label visible.
description_view_1: This side view displays the bottle's rectangular profile and the stopper, with no label or additional features visible.
description_view_2: The front view reveals the cream-colored label with black text, identifying the bottle as cough syrup, and shows the stopper clearly.
description_view_3: Another side view similar to view 1, showing the brown glass body and the stopper, with no label visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: A cream-colored rectangular label with black text on the front, reading 'COUGH SYRUP' and providing dosage and branding information in a classic serif font.
